---
title: "Contact | Divyas Mystic Sanctuary"
description: "Book a Tarot, Reiki or crystal ball session with Divyas Mystic Sanctuary."
---

<section class="page-hero reveal"><p class="eyebrow">Contact</p><h1>Let’s create space<br><em>for what matters.</em></h1><p class="page-hero__lead">To book a session or ask a question, send a message on WhatsApp. You will receive a reply with availability and next steps.</p></section>
<section id="book" class="booking-card booking-card--with-portrait reveal-on-scroll"><div class="booking-card__copy"><p class="section__overline">Book an appointment</p><h2>Your next moment<br><em>of clarity begins here.</em></h2><p>Choose a service, share what you would like support with, and we’ll take it from there.</p></div><div class="booking-card__action"><figure class="booking-card__portrait"><img src="images/Divya%20VS.png" alt="Divya, founder of Divyas Mystic Sanctuary"><figcaption>Connect with Divya</figcaption></figure><a class="button button--whatsapp" data-whatsapp href="https://wa.me/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Message on WhatsApp <span>↗</span></a></div></section>
<section class="section contact-links"><p class="section__overline">Stay connected</p><div class="contact-grid"><a href="mailto:divyasmysticsanctuary@gmail.com"><span>Email</span><strong>divyasmysticsanctuary@gmail.com</strong><i>↗</i></a><a href="https://www.facebook.com/people/Divyas-Mystic-Sanctuary/61591948555685/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span>Facebook</span><strong>Divyas Mystic Sanctuary</strong><i>↗</i></a><a data-whatsapp href="https://wa.me/919620308564" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span>WhatsApp</span><strong>+91 96203 08564</strong><i>↗</i></a></div><p class="contact-note">Online sessions are available by appointment.</p></section>
